code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut neg = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if in_num
        let v = sign * cur
        if v > 0
          p = p + v
        else if v < 0
          neg = neg + v
        end
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let v = sign * cur
    if v > 0
      p = p + v
    else if v < 0
      neg = neg + v
    end
  end
  let r = p - neg
  print("r=#{r}")
end
